display.logic: Eligible areas lack forest cover since 31 December 1989 and meet host-country forest thresholds at maturity.
display.notes: Document legal right and stakeholder consultation outcomes.
display.summary: Projects reforest lands without forest cover since 1989 and comply with national forest definitions.
display.title: Projects reforest lands without forest cover since 1989 and comply with national forest definitions.
when: Historical imagery confirms non-forest status since 1989.
National forest definition thresholds documented.

display.logic: Baseline carbon stock estimates rely on Tool 02 sampling guidance or conservative IPCC defaults.
display.notes: Describe sampling design and justify default values.
display.summary: Baseline biomass estimated using IPCC defaults or site-specific sampling following Tool 02.
display.title: Baseline biomass estimated using IPCC defaults or site-specific sampling following Tool 02.
when: Sampling plan approved during validation.
Baseline strata documentation provided to DOE.

logic: Baseline carbon stock estimates rely on Tool 02 sampling guidance or conservative IPCC defaults.
notes: Describe sampling design and justify default values.
summary: Baseline biomass estimated using IPCC defaults or site-specific sampling following Tool 02.
when: Sampling plan approved during validation.
Baseline strata documentation provided to DOE.

display.logic: Net anthropogenic GHG removals computed by summing project removals and subtracting baseline emissions and leakage deductions.
display.notes: Include harvested wood products where applicable.
display.summary: Net anthropogenic removals equal project removals minus baseline emissions and leakage.
display.title: Net anthropogenic removals equal project removals minus baseline emissions and leakage.
when: All carbon pools accounted for unless exclusion justified.
Leakage deduction applied before reporting net removal.

logic: Net anthropogenic GHG removals computed by summing project removals and subtracting baseline emissions and leakage deductions.

summary: Net anthropogenic removals equal project removals minus baseline emissions and leakage.
when: All carbon pools accounted for unless exclusion justified.
Leakage deduction applied before reporting net removal.

display.logic: Activity shifting leakage calculated with Tool 14 standardized factors and subtracted from project removals each monitoring period.
display.notes: Describe mitigation with community agreements and land-use controls.
display.summary: Activity shifting leakage quantified annually using Tool 14 and deducted from net removals.
display.title: Activity shifting leakage quantified annually using Tool 14 and deducted from net removals.
when: Leakage monitoring indicators collected annually.
Evidence of mitigation actions retained.

logic: Activity shifting leakage calculated with Tool 14 standardized factors and subtracted from project removals each monitoring period.

display.logic: Buffer share determined using Tool 15 risk analysis and recorded with registry documentation.
display.notes: Update risk analysis if management conditions or tenure change.
display.summary: Non-permanence risks addressed through buffer contributions per Tool 15 guidance.
display.title: Non-permanence risks addressed through buffer contributions per Tool 15 guidance.
when: Risk assessment updated at each verification.
Buffer transactions included in monitoring report.

display.logic: Permanent sample plots measured at ≤5-year intervals with QA/QC re-measurement requirements.
display.notes: Calibration records maintained for all instruments.
display.summary: Field biomass measurements conducted at least every five years using permanent plots.
display.title: Field biomass measurements conducted at least every five years using permanent plots.
when: Plot access maintained for full crediting period.
Calibration documentation provided to DOE.

logic: Permanent sample plots measured at ≤5-year intervals with QA/QC re-measurement requirements.

display.logic: When sampling precision exceeds 10%, apply Tool 12 conservative deductions before issuing credits.
display.notes: Include uncertainty worksheets in monitoring report annexes.
display.summary: Sampling uncertainty above 10% addressed with Tool 12 conservative adjustments.
display.title: Sampling uncertainty above 10% addressed with Tool 12 conservative adjustments.
when: Confidence interval wider than ±10%.
DOE reviews uncertainty calculation worksheets.

display.logic: Monitoring submissions include updated spatial data, field measurements, leakage results, and QA/QC documentation.
display.notes: Maintain records for at least two crediting periods.
display.summary: Monitoring reports consolidate maps, inventory data, leakage deductions, and QA/QC evidence.
display.title: Monitoring reports consolidate maps, inventory data, leakage deductions, and QA/QC evidence.
when: Reporting conforms to UNFCCC template.
Supporting datasets archived with version history.
